About

Paula

Paula is a 26-year-old artist working across sculpture and painting. Her practice explores form, materiality, and the tension between the handmade and the conceptual.

Rooted in a rigorous academic background across three countries, her work draws on a diverse range of influences — from Scandinavian traditions to contemporary European art discourse.

  • Bachelor's degree — The Royal Institute of Art, Stockholm
  • Master's degree — The Funen Art Academy, Odense
  • Exchange semester (6 months) — Universität der Künste, Berlin

Acquire

Acquire a work

Whether you are looking to commission a bespoke artwork tailored to your vision, or to acquire an existing piece from Paula's practice — all enquiries are welcome.

Commissions are taken on a case-by-case basis across both sculpture and painting. Please reach out to discuss availability, pricing, and timelines.

All purchases are handled directly — no intermediaries.
